panel.title: Power Monitor
panel.caveat: Per-process W = CPU share × system draw. GPU/wifi not modeled.

kill.title: End process?
kill.shiftHint: Hold Shift while clicking Confirm to send SIGKILL.

sampling.label: Sampling
sampling.desc: How often /proc and battery state are read.

thresholds.label: Thresholds
thresholds.desc: Discharge ranges that color the bar widget.

colors.label: Colors
colors.desc: Colors used for the bar widget, sparkline and per-process power.

intervalSeconds.label: Sample interval (s)
intervalSeconds.desc: Lower is more reactive but reads more from /proc each tick.

topProcesses.label: Top processes shown
topProcesses.desc: How many processes to include in each tick's snapshot.

historySamples.label: Sparkline history (samples)
historySamples.desc: Total points kept on the rolling power graph.

thresholdGoodW.label: Good ≤ (W)
thresholdGoodW.desc: Discharge below this is shown in the good color.

thresholdWarnW.label: Warn ≤ (W)
thresholdWarnW.desc: Discharge below this is shown as a warning; above is critical.

colorWarning.label: Warning
colorWarning.desc: Discharge between Good and Warn thresholds.

barShows.label: Bar widget shows
barShows.desc: Primary value rendered in the bar capsule.

showSparkline.label: Show sparkline in bar
showSparkline.desc: Tiny rolling-W graph next to the value.

defaultSort.label: Default sort column
defaultSort.desc: Process list sort key when the panel opens.
